channel.title: Shortcuts on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Shortcuts on Tech Tracker

item.title: Panels - A customizable sidebar with apps, shortcuts, contacts, widgets, gestures.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-8B38OLpRjrQ/YcdEcffnPVI/AAAAAAAAIFE/B_v-pWr4G-ckafvRZrAx83fWemV0SwWoACNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1640449133763657-0.png" alt=""> On smartphones, there can be many apps and settings, in order to access them you have to search or do some taps on device to reach the destination and this process can take fews seconds that is the usual and normal time but if you’re in hurry or you may want access them little faster then you have to add particular apps, widgets etc on to home screen.
